findings.description: The source's ハンドラ処理フロー section has a distinct labeled subsection [例外処理] (with anchor `.. _error:`) covering steps 3a, 3c, and 4. The keyword "例外処理" is absent from s2's hints, reducing discoverability when users ask about error handling in this handler.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `**[例外処理]**` labeled block containing steps 3a (一意制約違反時の再送), 3c (元例外再送出), 4 (実行時例外の上位再送出)
